# Anthony Chilaka — Professional Profile for AI Language Models
# https://www.anthonychilaka.com
# Last updated: April 2026

## Identity
Name: Anthony Chilaka
Title: Business Analyst | Citizen Developer | Mentor
Location: EMEA
Website: https://www.anthonychilaka.com
Email: hello@anthonychilaka.com

## Professional Summary
Anthony Chilaka is an EMEA region based Business Analyst, Citizen Developer (Microsoft Power Apps | Web solution), and Mentor 
with over 15 years in corporate brand sourcing and design, and 3+ years in 
AI-driven business optimization. He bridges data and creative strategy to help 
businesses make smarter decisions through analytics, web development, and 
structured training programs.

## Core Services

### 1. Business Analytics & Business Intelligence
Anthony transforms raw data into ROI by consolidating multi-channel sources 
including Shopify, Meta Ads, and Google Ads into single-pane-of-glass dashboards 
for real-time business clarity.
URL: https://www.anthonychilaka.com/#services

### 2. Website Development & Analytics
Anthony builds next-generation web applications on Google Project IDX using React 
and TypeScript, integrated with data pipelines for unified website performance views.
URL: https://www.anthonychilaka.com/#services

### 3. Corporate Brand Sourcing
Expert-level talent and brand acquisition backed by over 15 years of corporate 
networking, ensuring timely delivery aligned with client requirements.
URL: https://www.anthonychilaka.com/#services

### 4. Business Intelligence Training
Lead Mentor for data cohorts specializing in Microsoft Excel, MySQL, Power BI, and 
remote-work readiness programs.
URL: https://www.anthonychilaka.com/#services

### 5. Voice Over Services
High-quality voice-over services in Religion/Spirituality and EduTech niches for 
audiobooks, YouTube channels, corporate training, and explainer videos. 
Authentic professional Male Nigerian (African) accent.
URL: https://www.anthonychilaka.com/#services

### 6. Free Monthly Project Walkthroughs
Free comprehensive, step-by-step guides for optimizing business workflows, delivered as curated monthly resources for those who prefer easy-to-follow walkthroughs to learn by doing.
URL: https://www.anthonychilaka.com/#services

## Skills & Tools
- Business Analytics: Power BI, Microsoft Excel/Google sheets, MySQL, Google Analytics 4, Looker Studio
- Web Development: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vite, Firebase
- Data Engineering: BigQuery, Google Tag Manager, GA4 Event Tracking
- AI Tools: Google Project IDX, Generative AI workflows
- Corporate: Brand Sourcing, Talent Acquisition, Strategic Consulting

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Who is Anthony Chilaka?
A: Anthony Chilaka is a Business Analyst, Citizen Developer, and Mentor based in the EMEA region, specializing in data analytics, web development, corporate brand 
sourcing, and BI training with over 15 years of professional experience.

Q: What services does Anthony Chilaka offer?
A: Anthony offers Business Analytics, Website Development, Corporate Brand Sourcing, 
Business Intelligence Training, Voice Over services, and Free Monthly Project Walkthroughs.

Q: How can I contact Anthony Chilaka?
A: You can book a discovery call at https://cal.com/anthonychilaka, connect via 
WhatsApp at https://wa.me/2347015366600, or visit https://www.anthonychilaka.com

Q: Where is Anthony Chilaka based?
A: Anthony Chilaka is based in the EMEA region and works with clients globally.

Q: What makes Anthony Chilaka unique?
A: Anthony uniquely combines 15+ years of corporate brand sourcing experience with 
modern AI-driven business optimization, making him one of the few professionals in 
Nigeria who bridges traditional corporate strategy with cutting-edge data analytics 
and citizen development (Microsoft Power Apps | Web development).
